sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n63452" key="linufantiko/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">λῐνῠφαντ-ικός</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ή</itype>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">όν</itype>, <sense id="n63452.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">of</tr_> or <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">for linen-weaving</tr_>, <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ἐργαλεῖα</foreign> ib.<bibl n="http://www.trismegistos.org/text/3874" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">242</biblScope> </bibl> <date TEIform="date">(ii B. C.)</date>.</sense> </entryFree>
